mapper.select: /** UsptEvlLastSlctnDao.select */ select evl_last_slctn_id , evl_plan_id , last_slctn , last_slctn_dt , slctn_dspth , slctn_dspth_dt , slctn_sndng_mth , slctn_sndng_cn , ptrmsn_dspth , ptrmsn_dspth_dt , ptrmsn_sndng_mth , ptrmsn_sndng_cn , last_slctn_process_div_cd , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_evl_last_slctn where evl_last_slctn_id = #{evlLastSlctnId}

/** UsptEvlLastSlctnDao.selectListCount */ select count(sub.evl_last_slctn_id) from ( select uels.evl_last_slctn_id , case when uels.last_slctn = true then 'SLCTN' else 'ING' end as process_sttus , ub.bsns_year , ubp.pblanc_nm , ub.chrg_dept_nm , ci.member_nm as charger_nm , case when uels.slctn_dspth = true and uels.ptrmsn_dspth = true then 'COMPT' else 'ING' end as dspth_sttus from uspt_evl_last_slctn uels inner join uspt_evl_plan uep on uep.evl_plan_id = uels.evl_plan_id and uep.evl_type_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@EVL_TYPE_01_CODE}' and uep.evl_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@EVL_STTUS_03_CODE}' and uep.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = uep.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = uep.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.reprsnt_charger = true inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc1 on ubc1.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc1.insider_id = #{insiderId} inner join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = ubc.insider_id ) sub

/** UsptEvlLastSlctnDao.selectList */ select sub.* , row_number() over (order by sub.created_dt desc) as rn from ( select uels.evl_last_slctn_id , case when uels.last_slctn = true then 'SLCTN' else 'ING' end as process_sttus , ub.bsns_year , ubp.pblanc_nm , case when ubp.ordtm_rcrit = true then '상시모집' else '정시모집' end as ordtm_rcrit , case when ubp.ordtm_rcrit = true then ubpr.rcept_odr || '차' else '' end as rcept_odr , ub.chrg_dept_nm , ci.member_nm as charger_nm , uels.last_slctn_dt , case when uels.slctn_dspth = true and uels.ptrmsn_dspth = true then 'COMPT' else 'ING' end as dspth_sttus , uels.created_dt from uspt_evl_last_slctn uels inner join uspt_evl_plan uep on uep.evl_plan_id = uels.evl_plan_id and uep.evl_type_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@EVL_TYPE_01_CODE}' and uep.evl_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@EVL_STTUS_03_CODE}' and uep.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = uep.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = uep.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.reprsnt_charger = true inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc1 on ubc1.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc1.insider_id = #{insiderId} inner join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = ubc.insider_id ) sub
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptEvlLastSlctnDao.selectSlctnDetail */ select uels.evl_last_slctn_id , uels.last_slctn , uels.last_slctn_dt , uels.last_slctn_process_div_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@LSPD_CODE_GROUP}', uels.last_slctn_process_div_cd) as last_slctn_process_div , case when uels.slctn_dspth = true and uels.ptrmsn_dspth = true then 'COMPT' else 'ING' end as dspth_sttus , ub.bsns_nm , ub.bsns_year , ubp.pblanc_nm , ubp.pblanc_no , case when ubp.ordtm_rcrit = true then '상시모집' else '정시모집' end as ordtm_rcrit , case when ubp.ordtm_rcrit = true then ubpr.rcept_odr || '차' else '' end as rcept_odr , ub.chrg_dept_nm , ci.member_nm as charger_nm , ubc1.charger_author_cd , uep.wct_mdat_dlbrt , usb.bsns_type_cd from uspt_evl_last_slctn uels inner join uspt_evl_plan uep on uep.evl_plan_id = uels.evl_plan_id and uep.evl_type_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@EVL_TYPE_01_CODE}' and uep.evl_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@EVL_STTUS_03_CODE}' and uep.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = uep.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = uep.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.reprsnt_charger = true inner join uspt_stdr_bsns usb on usb.stdr_bsns_cd = ub.stdr_bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc1 on ubc1.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc1.insider_id = #{insiderId} inner join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = ubc.insider_id where uels.evl_last_slctn_id = #{evlLastSlctnId}

/** UsptEvlLastSlctnDao.selectSlctnTrgetList */ select ubpa.apply_id , ubpa.receipt_no , cm.member_nm , ulst.slctn , case when ulst.slctn = true then '선정' else '탈락' end as slctn_at , ubs.bsns_slctn_id , ubs.total_wct , ubs.sport_budget , ubs.alotm_cash , ubs.alotm_acthng , row_number() over (order by ubpa.receipt_no) as rn from uspt_evl_last_slctn uels inner join uspt_evl_plan uep on uep.evl_plan_id = uels.evl_plan_id and uep.evl_type_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@EVL_TYPE_01_CODE}' and uep.evl_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@EVL_STTUS_03_CODE}' and uep.enabled = true inner join uspt_evl_step ues on ues.evl_plan_id = uep.evl_plan_id and ues.sort_ordr_no = (select max(sort_ordr_no) from uspt_evl_step where evl_plan_id = uep.evl_plan_id) and ues.evl_step_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@EVL_STEP_03_CODE}' inner join uspt_evl_trget uet on uet.evl_step_id = ues.evl_step_id and uet.slctn = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = uep.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = uep.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id and ubpa.rcept_odr = ubpr.rcept_odr and ubpa.rcept_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RS_COMPT_CODE}' and ubpa.apply_id = uet.apply_id inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} left outer join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.evl_last_slctn_id = uels.evl_last_slctn_id and ulst.apply_id = uet.apply_id left outer join uspt_bsns_slctn ubs on ubs.last_slctn_trget_id = ulst.last_slctn_trget_id where uels.evl_last_slctn_id = #{evlLastSlctnId}

select cm.member_id , cm.member_nm , cm.enc_email , cm.enc_mobile_no from uspt_evl_last_slctn uels inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.evl_last_slctn_id = uels.evl_last_slctn_id and ulst.slctn = ${slctn} inner join uspt_evl_plan uep on uep.evl_plan_id = uels.evl_plan_id and uep.evl_type_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@EVL_TYPE_01_CODE}' and uep.evl_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@EVL_STTUS_03_CODE}' and uep.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = uep.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = uep.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id and ubpa.rcept_odr = ubpr.rcept_odr and ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id and ubpa.rcept_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RS_COMPT_CODE}' inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} where uels.evl_last_slctn_id = #{evlLastSlctnId}
